news.summary: Newell Brands Inc. disclosed that their President and CEO, Chris Peterson, along with CFO Mark Erceg, are scheduled to speak at the dbAccess Global Consumer Conference in Paris at 2:30 a.m. ET (8:30 a.m. CEST) on June 4, 2025. The presentation will be available via webcast accessible through the Investors section of the company's website at www.newellbrands.com. The webcast will also be archived for future reference.
news.headline: Newell Brands to present at dbAccess Global Consumer Conference in Paris on June 4, 2025, at 2:30 a.m. ET. Webcast available.

news.summary: Cetus, a DEX on the Sui blockchain, is suspected to have been exploited, draining over $200 million in digital assets. A Web3 researcher flagged the exploit, with many assets losing over half their value. Cetus processed $2.9 billion worth of transactions, an 89% increase in a day. Tokens like LBTC and AXOL lost significant value, with the top 15 losers losing over three-quarters of their price. The exploiter's address holds millions in various assets. Cetus paused its smart contract for safety and is investigating. AMLBot noted suspicious fund transfers, with doubts raised on project transparency. The exploit involved gaining control of SUI pools, moving over $200 million and USDC. Further updates are expected as the situation develops.
news.headline: Suspected hack at Sui DEX Cetus: Potentially over $200M in losses, $2.9B transactions processed today, top losers lose 75%+ value, exploit under investigation.

news.summary: Reklaim Protect has experienced a significant increase in revenue from its high-margin recurring services. The demand for its privacy-compliant data platform has led to a remarkable 94% growth in data sales. The company, based in New York and listed on TSXV (MYID) and OTC (MYIDF), reported these positive financial results on May 22, 2025.
news.headline: Reklaim Ltd. sees 73% revenue growth in Q1 2025, launches subscription service; 94% increase in data sales demand.

news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida on May 22, 2025, All About Cookies, an online platform focused on promoting internet safety, revealed the recipients of its inaugural Editor's Choice VPN Awards. This selection of Virtual Private Networks, or VPNs, recognizes outstanding performers in the industry.
news.headline: All About Cookies announces winners of 2025 VPN Awards in Delray Beach, Florida. First-ever Editor's Choice list of VPNs revealed.

news.summary: A mobile lab service provider, Phlebotomy on Wheels, based in Perry Hall, Maryland, shared that they have introduced new staffing solutions on May 22, 2025. The initiative is targeted towards supporting healthcare facilities such as hospitals, doctors' offices, and nursing homes with reliable healthcare professionals. This move is anticipated to assist these institutions in meeting their staffing needs effectively.
news.headline: Phlebotomy on Wheels introduces new staffing solutions to boost allied health services for providers.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, in Beckley, West Virginia, a watch brand known as Pangino has made a name for itself by offering distinctive luxury timepieces. Describing itself as an "Italian-American" business, Pangino takes inspiration from the architectural and geographical aspects of Italy's central region, Abruzzo. This brand stands out in the market for its unique designs, setting it apart from competitors.

news.summary: MouthWatch, Inc.'s virtual-first dental care solution Dentistry.One has recently been acknowledged by the Digital Medicine Society for its innovative approach to oral healthcare. This recognition took place on May 22, 2025, in Metuchen, N.J. Dentistry.One has set a new standard in virtual-first dentistry and has become the first of its kind to receive the prestigious DiMe Seal of Approval. This accomplishment highlights the impact of Dentistry.One in revolutionizing the dental care sector with its cutting-edge technology and patient-first approach.
news.headline: Dentistry.One earns DiMe Seal for virtual dental healthcare. First provider to set new benchmark.Cited by Digital Medicine Society.

news.summary: In Cairo on May 20, 2025, the renowned auto brand JETOUR unveiled its latest lite off-road vehicle, T1, at the Pyramid of Khufu in Egypt. The event saw the presence of key dignitaries including Egypt's Minister of Commerce, Minister of the Chinese Embassy in Egypt, and Deputy President.

news.summary: In Brooksville, Florida on May 22, 2025, EquiNew, a prominent provider of Functional Electrical Stimulation (FES) therapy for horses, is pleased to showcase the accomplishments of Mallory Thompson, Director of Therapy Training at EquiNew, alongside her dedicated client, a prominent figure in the United States.

news.summary: RobotLAB, a prominent company in robotics integration and automation, has recently launched RobotLAB San Jose in California on May 22, 2025. This move signifies the company's expansion into a key innovation hub. The new facility in San Jose will be overseen by Shishir Sharma, a skilled tech consultant. This development underscores RobotLAB's dedication to growth and leadership in the field of robotics and automation.

news.summary: Jim LoDestro has been appointed as Chief of Global Sales Strategy at GridGain, a provider of the sole integrated real-time data storage and processing platform for transactional, analytical, and AI workloads. The announcement was made on May 22, 2025, at PALO ALTO, California.

news.summary: Mobile Infrastructure Corporation (NYSE American: BEEP) is set to start trading on The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC under its existing ticker symbol “BEEP” on Friday, May 23, 2025. The company's shares will remain listed on the NYSE American until the market closes on Thursday, May 22, 2025. news.summary: On May 22, 2025, DSS, Inc., listed on NYSE American as DSS, shared its financial performance for Q1 2025. news.summary: A recent patent approval has propelled the neural gesture technology of Wearable Devices forward, enabling the smooth execution of functions such as pinch-to-zoom, volume adjustment, and manipulation of objects in mid-air. news.headline: Konexial launches revamped website www.konexial.com, serving as a hub for supply chain, logistics, and fleet technology.

news.summary: Elvis Medica, MBA, has been appointed as a Wealth Management Advisor at Porte Brown Wealth Management LLC in Elk Grove Village, Illinois. The firm, located in the Chicago metro area and operating through pbwealth.net, welcomes Medica who brings almost three decades of financial experience to the team.
news.headline: Porte Brown Wealth Management appoints Elvis Medica as Wealth Management Advisor in Chicago with 30 years of experience.

news.summary: A company based in Waltham, Mass, Thermo Fisher Scientific, has unveiled the Thermo Scientific™ TruNarc™ Delta and Tau Handheld Narcotics Analyzers. These devices are designed to aid communities in tackling both established and new narcotics and illicit substances. By utilizing touchless technology and boasting an enhanced chemical database, these user-friendly tools enable frontline law enforcement personnel to detect over 1,200 substances on-site. This includes a range of drugs like stimulants, depressants, and hallucinogens.
news.headline: Thermo Fisher Scientific introduces new TruNarc Handheld Narcotics Analyzers to identify 1,200 substances, aiding law enforcement.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, Brag House Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: TBH) revealed the successful debut of the inaugural Brag Gators Gauntlet series, a Gen Z engagement platform uniting gaming, college sports, and digital media. news.summary: INBS will be teaming up with their U.S. distribution partner, SMARTOX, at the upcoming RISE25 event. RISE25 is a prominent conference in the United States focused on addiction, mental health, and justice innovation, attracting more than 7,000 attendees each year.

news.summary: The latest version of Synchronoss Personal Cloud, version 25.5, introduces innovative AI functionalities such as Stylized Moments, Locations Map, and Then and Now. These enhancements are aimed at improving the discovery and user engagement with photos on the platform.
news.headline: Synchronoss Personal Cloud 25.5 introduces AI features, Including Stylized Moments, Locations Map, and Then and Now, to improve photo discovery and engagement.

news.summary: SENTI-202 is currently undergoing Phase 1 clinical trials for the treatment of relapsed/refractory hematologic malignancies, such as acute myeloid leukemia. The study aims to evaluate the efficacy and safety of SENTI-202 in this patient population. This experimental treatment shows promising potential in providing a new therapeutic option for individuals with these challenging conditions. Patients enrolled in the study will be closely monitored to assess the drug's impact on their condition. The results of this Phase 1 trial will provide valuable insights into the use of SENTI-202 in the treatment of hematologic malignancies, with a focus on acute myeloid leukemia.
news.headline: Senti Bio gets $1.0M from CIRM for SENTI-202 clinical development in relapsed/refractory hematologic malignancies.
Roku TVs now offer on-demand content through Truth+ service, enhancing user experience.

news.summary: In New York, Pagaya Technologies LTD. (NASDAQ: PGY) introduced POSH (Pagaya Point of Sale Holdings Trust), a novel asset-backed revolving securitization initiative targeting point-of-sale financing in the U.S. market. This program is designed to enhance Pagaya's role as a growth driver for point-of-sale providers by providing increased funding capabilities. Powered by AI technology, Pagaya aims to advance financial solutions by leveraging POSH to fuel innovation and support the growth of point-of-sale financing services in the U.S. market.
news.headline: Pagaya secures $1 billion in funding for POS securitization to boost point-of-sale financing in US.

news.summary: A company in Philadelphia, AutoNation, has upgraded its marketing analytics by implementing Qlik Cloud Analytics and Snowflake. This move aims to boost efficiency and outcomes for the company.

news.summary: Sigma, a prominent analytics platform known for its cloud data platform writeback capabilities, has welcomed two experienced technology executives to its product team in San Francisco. Hassen Karaa has been appointed as the Senior Vice President of Product, while Marwan Mattar joins as the Vice President of AI. This move aims to drive Sigma's goal of enabling all users to analyze and utilize data with the assistance of artificial intelligence. Through this strategic hire, Sigma seeks to enhance its generative intelligence features and expand its overall product offerings.
news.headline: Sigma hires 2 technology leaders, Karaa as SVP of Product and Mattar as VP of AI, to boost innovation, AI efforts - via Business Wire.

news.summary: Verint (NASDAQ: VRNT) from Melville, N.Y., the CX Automation Company™, has revealed plans for its upcoming Engage 2025 conference. The event will center around the role of AI in Customer Experience (CX) and its future. Industry experts and leaders will be present to provide insights and inspiration to attendees. The focus will be on how AI is being utilized to transform contact center operations, improve customer experiences, and generate significant real-world value, with millions of dollars at stake. This event is essential for anyone involved in CX, contact center, and AI deployment.
news.headline: Verint's Engage 2025 conference will discuss AI in CX with leaders driving millions in value. #CXAutomation #AI

news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas, Omnicell is anticipating enhanced profitability as they provide an update on their second quarter and full year 2025 profit projections during a recent announcement. The company also disclosed a new stock repurchase initiative as part of their strategic plans. This development indicates a positive outlook for the company's financial performance in upcoming periods.
news.headline: Omnicell in Fort Worth, Texas, predicts increased profitability, updates 2025 outlook, and unveils stock repurchase program.

news.summary: In Nürtingen, Germany, ADS-TEC Energy (NASDAQ: ADSE) recently revealed that they have installed their fast-charging system, ChargeBox, at several Ford dealerships in Alabama. Long-Lewis Auto Group has introduced this battery-buffered, ultra-fast charging platform at key locations such as Long-Lewis Ford of Hoover, Long-Lewis Ford of the River Region, and Long-Lewis Ford of the Shoals. These charging stations are open to the public and offer efficient electric vehicle charging services. ADS-TEC Energy continues to expand its reach with advanced energy solutions in the market.
news.headline: Long-Lewis Auto Group partners with ADS-TEC Energy for EV charging, deploying ChargeBox at Ford dealerships in Alabama.

news.summary: New York and London - Diligent, a prominent leader in governance, risk, and compliance SaaS solutions powered by AI, has revealed the acquisition of Vault, an advanced ethics and compliance solution driven by AI. The objective behind this acquisition is to enable organizations to promote a culture where employees feel empowered to raise concerns, reduce the risks associated with misconduct, and enhance overall compliance efforts. This move signals a shift towards a proactive approach to integrity, acknowledging the shortcomings of traditional ethics and compliance systems. Through this integration of Vault's innovative technology, Diligent aims to revolutionize the realm of governance and compliance.
news.headline: Diligent acquires Vault, AI ethics & compliance solution, for proactive integrity. Leading in GRC SaaS solutions.

news.summary: In Mesa, Arizona, Iveda® (NASDAQ: IVDA), a prominent player in AI-based video surveillance and smart city solutions, has revealed the launch of its IvedaAI™ platform in a significant city center in the Philippines with an initial order of $180,000. This development signifies the company's inaugural smart city installation amidst its larger $3 million smart city project in the area. Commencing operations in Manila, Iveda Philippines is collaborating with local authorities and their existing infrastructure.
news.headline: Iveda deploys smart city tech in Manila with $180,000 order, part of $3 million initiative in Philippines.

Interested parties can arrange meetings by contacting their Goldman Sachs representative.

news.summary: In New York, Schrödinger, Inc. (Nasdaq: SDGR) revealed that company executives will be engaging in a fireside chat during the Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference. This live discussion is scheduled for Wednesday, June 4, 2025, at 1:25 p.m. E.T. To view the webcast live, interested individuals can visit the “Investors” section of Schrödinger’s website. Additionally, the webcast will be archived for roughly 90 days post-event. Schrödinger is a leading figure in revolutionizing molecular discovery through computational methods.
news.headline: Schrödinger to present at Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference on June 4, 2025 at 1:25 p.m. Live webcast available. Nasdaq: SDGR.

news.summary: Cetus, a decentralized exchange (DEX) on the Sui blockchain, has been exploited, potentially causing the loss of more than $200 million in digital assets. Tokens like LBTC and AXOL on Cetus lost almost all their value, with the top 15 losers losing over three-quarters of their price. The alleged exploiter holds significant amounts of different assets, including $52 million in SUI tokens. Cetus has confirmed an incident, pausing the smart contract for safety with an ongoing investigation. Concerns have been raised about the project's transparency, with doubts over claims that it was just a bug and not a hack. AMLBot representative criticized the timing of the incident and raised suspicions about the large fund transfers taking place. Onchain data shows the attacker gaining control of SUI pools and exploiting over $200M. This is an evolving situation, with further updates to follow.
news.headline: Potential hack at Sui DEX Cetus: $200M+ losses reported. Multiple assets plunged, with top 15 suffering >75% losses. Investigation ongoing.

news.summary: Sidus Space announced the launch of Fortis™ VPX, a durable and adaptable SOSA™ aligned computing system designed for high-reliability command and data handling, advanced artificial intelligence/machine learning processing, and precision navigation in challenging conditions. This product is part of the Fortis™ line and marks a significant advancement in space and defense technology. Sidus Space, listed on NASDAQ as SIDU, is a company known for innovation in this sector.
news.headline: Sidus Space launches Fortis™ VPX, a rugged AI-powered 3U OpenVPX module for complex missions; includes high-reliability C&DH and AI/ML processing.

news.summary: Today, RXO (NYSE: RXO), a prominent asset-light transportation solutions provider, unveiled its newest update of the Curve truckload market forecast in Charlotte, North Carolina. The Q2 Curve update recaps the first-quarter performance, highlighting key macroeconomic indicators and trends influencing the truckload market. The report forecasts a continued year-over-year rise in truckload rates in the initial quarter. The update delivers insights into the second-quarter freight market forecast, showcasing an ongoing increase in truckload rates.
news.headline: RXO updates its Curve truckload market forecast, showing a year-over-year increase in rates in Q1. #transportation

news.summary: BlackSky, in partnership with Rocket Lab, has announced a scheduled launch window opening on May 27 for their second Gen-3 satellite as part of the "Full Stream Ahead" mission. This mission aims to deploy advanced artificial intelligence technology into orbit, with the satellite set to be launched by Rocket Lab. The partnership between BlackSky and Rocket Lab signifies a significant advancement in space technology and represents a key collaboration in the industry. Stay tuned for updates on the progress of this mission.
news.headline: BlackSky and Rocket Lab set May 27 launch for second Gen-3 satellite on "Full Stream Ahead" mission. #BKSY

news.summary: In Long Beach, California, Rocket Lab USA, Inc. (Nasdaq: RKLB) revealed the upcoming launch window for its mission with BlackSky (NYSE: BSKY). The mission named "Full Stream Ahead" is set to launch from Rocket Lab Launch Complex 1 in New Zealand on May 28th, 2025 UTC. This operation is vital for real-time space-based intelligence services and will deploy the latest of BlackSky’s Gen-3 satellites. Rocket Lab is a renowned global leader in launch services and space systems.
news.headline: Rocket Lab to launch "Full Stream Ahead" mission for BlackSky on May 28 from New Zealand complex.
